testcase.name: agent.waitingState
testcase.system-out: Hub session "r1-base" reached "waiting" via a controlled PreToolUse-without-Stop (states: working->waiting)

testcase.name: file.rename
testcase.system-out: disk renamed; tab references fleet-rename-new.txt: true

testcase.name: git.initStageCommit
testcase.system-out: git log shows 1 commit ("fleet: initial commit"), tree clean

testcase.name: agent.workingState
testcase.system-out: Hub session "r1-base-f7" reached "working" after UserPromptSubmit (states: working)

testcase.name: search.findInFiles
testcase.system-out: executeCommand(findInFiles) returned ok (no view in snapshot to assert)

testcase.name: agent.stopIdle
testcase.system-out: Hub session "r1-base-f8": working→idle on a bare Stop

testcase.name: file.openMissing
testcase.system-out: ok:false with error "request failed: CodeExpectedError: cannot open vscode-remote://127.0.0.1:64171/home/coder/project/ghost.txt. Detail: Unable to read file 'vscode-remote://127.0.0.1:64171/home/coder/project/ghost.txt' (Error: Unable to resolve nonexistent file 'vscode-remote://127.0.0.1:64171/home/coder/project/ghost.txt')" (defined refusal)

testcase.name: agent.stopDone
testcase.system-out: Hub session "r1-base-f9": working→done on a Stop with reason:"completed"

testcase.name: agent.waitingCoalesced
testcase.system-out: Hub session "r1-base-f11": one waiting coalesced across two PreToolUse (runs 0→1, ≤ +1)

testcase.name: agent.waitingCancelled
testcase.system-out: Hub session "r1-base-f10" never showed "waiting"; settled idle (the pre-debounce Stop cancelled the arm)

testcase.name: view.explorer
testcase.system-out: workbench.view.explorer resolved ok (no view in snapshot to assert); repeat also ok

testcase.name: agent.multiTurnOneRun
testcase.system-out: Hub session "r1-base-f13": two turns cycled working↔idle on ONE run (runs 0→1, ≤ +1)

testcase.name: agent.subagentStopLiveness
testcase.system-out: Hub session "r1-base-f14": SubagentStop kept the run working; a real Stop then settled idle

testcase.name: scm.openView
testcase.system-out: workbench.view.scm resolved ok (no view in snapshot to assert); repeat also ok

testcase.name: net.hostDockerInternalReachable
testcase.system-out: host.docker.internal resolves (192.168.5.2) and :51777 is reachable (nc rc=0)

testcase.name: net.hubBoundAllInterfaces
testcase.system-out: Hub :51777 reachable from BOTH host loopback and the container (0.0.0.0 bind confirmed)

testcase.name: agent.waitingApprovalUrgency
testcase.system-out: Hub session "r1-base-f15" row shows [waiting] AND [approval] ("[waiting] r1-base-f15 (1 run) [approval]")

testcase.name: agent.concurrentSessions
testcase.system-out: Hub session "r1-base-f16": two concurrent sessions → +2 runs (0→2); anchorless frame minted no phantom; settled idle

testcase.name: agent.emptyQuiescent
testcase.system-out: Hub session "r1-base-f17" is quiescent [idle] with no spurious working/waiting

testcase.name: net.reporterSocketLocalOnly
testcase.system-out: /tmp/fleet-reporter.sock is a unix socket mode 600; no in-container hook TCP listener (ss/netstat absent — TCP check best-effort)

testcase.name: hub.runUpsertRecomputesRollup
testcase.system-out: env Hub session "r1-base": done→working after one injected run.upsert (UserPromptSubmit)

testcase.name: editor.openMissingNoop
testcase.system-out: reply ok:false; activeEditor unchanged; file still absent

testcase.name: hub.doneDistinctFromIdle

failure.message: done/idle not both observed as distinct tokens (done="done", idle="done"; doneSeen=["done"], idleSeen=["done"])

testcase.failure: done/idle not both observed as distinct tokens (done="done", idle="done"; doneSeen=["done"], idleSeen=["done"])
testcase.system-out: done/idle not both observed as distinct tokens (done="done", idle="done"; doneSeen=["done"], idleSeen=["done"])

testcase.name: hub.waitingWinsRollup
testcase.system-out: env Hub session "r1-base" rolled up to "[waiting]" with a concurrent working run present (waiting dominates; states: working->waiting)

testcase.name: editor.nextPrevCycles
testcase.system-out: start active="/home/coder/project/b.txt" (want b.txt); after next moved-away=true; after prev returned=true

testcase.name: input.typeNoEditor
testcase.system-out: typeText inserted=false (want false); activeEditor still null=true; PROJECT listing unchanged=true

testcase.name: reporter.promptWorkingThenStopIdle

failure.message: working/idle not both observed (working=true, idle=false; states seen: ["working","done"])

testcase.failure: working/idle not both observed (working=true, idle=false; states seen: ["working","done"])
testcase.system-out: working/idle not both observed (working=true, idle=false; states seen: ["working","done"])

testcase.name: reporter.twoSessionsTwoRuns
testcase.system-out: Hub session "r1-base": two sessions → 9 runs; resolving A left 9 (≥3) — independent runs

testcase.name: search.replaceInFiles
testcase.system-out: workbench.action.replaceInFiles resolved (replace UI not in snapshot)

testcase.name: quickOpen.command
testcase.system-out: quickOpen resolved; activeEditor unchanged (no pick yet)

testcase.name: input.typeRoutesEditor
testcase.system-out: marker in editor=true (want true); marker in terminal=false (want false)

testcase.name: search.regexReplace
testcase.system-out: regex replace redacted 3 id= lines, preserved name=foo

testcase.name: search.caseSensitiveReplace
testcase.system-out: case-sensitive replace touched only lowercase foo

testcase.name: input.unicodeTypeText
testcase.system-out: CJK present=true; emoji present=true; on-disk grep 🚀=true

testcase.name: search.wholeWordReplace
testcase.system-out: whole-word replace touched only standalone cat

testcase.name: view.toggleSidebarRoundtrip
testcase.system-out: toggleSidebarVisibility x2 resolved; visibleEditors stable, openTabs stable

testcase.name: input.terminalTextEmpty
testcase.system-out: terminalText source="", no phantom "$ " cmd: true

testcase.name: file.createDeepDir
testcase.system-out: writeFile ok:true, file on disk: true (must be true)

testcase.name: file.closeWhenEmpty
testcase.system-out: close on empty editor set was a benign no-op (openTabs stayed 0, ok)

testcase.name: editor.splitWhenEmpty
testcase.system-out: split on empty layout was benign (ok; visibleEditors 0→0, no regression)

testcase.name: view.quickOpenCommand
testcase.system-out: quickOpen resolved; activeEditor unchanged (no pick yet)

testcase.name: view.unknownCommandFails
testcase.system-out: unknown command id failed cleanly (ok:false) in 300ms: request failed: Error: command 'workbench.action.doesNotExist.fleet' not found

testcase.name: settings.readMinimapDefault
testcase.system-out: editor.minimap.enabled read back as boolean true

testcase.name: editor.typeFocusRouting
testcase.system-out: marker routed ONLY into fleet-b.txt (the focused editor)

testcase.name: settings.readUnknownKey
testcase.system-out: unknown key read back as undefined with ok:true

testcase.name: settings.readEmptyKeyFails
testcase.system-out: empty key failed cleanly: request failed: Error: setting requires key

testcase.name: file.deleteWhileOpen
testcase.system-out: file deleted on disk; second openFile returned a defined reply within 3s

testcase.name: file.saveAllClean
testcase.system-out: saveAll on a clean workbench was a no-op (no mtime changes)

testcase.name: ext.helloCaps
testcase.system-out: all 16 frozen CAPS advertised by the bridge

testcase.name: file.unicodeName
testcase.system-out: activeBasename ok=true ("/home/coder/project/fleet space ünïcode.txt"); fileContent ok=true; disk ok=true

testcase.name: ext.shapeStableMinimal
testcase.system-out: minimal extensions list well-formed (93 entries, fleet-bridge present)

testcase.name: git.reinit
testcase.system-out: reinit was idempotent (exit 0, still a work tree, identity preserved)

testcase.name: file.mountParity
testcase.system-out: bridge-written bytes are byte-identical in the container shell (same mount)

testcase.name: ext.bridgeLogActivation
testcase.system-out: bridge log records activation (activate: + ws/hello) at /tmp/fleet-mux/bridge-r1-base.log

testcase.name: scm.openViewNoRepo
testcase.system-out: SCM view opened in a non-repo workspace (scmChanges=undefined)

testcase.name: git.diffHunk
testcase.system-out: git diff shows exactly b→B-CHANGED; a and c untouched

testcase.name: git.untrackedChange
testcase.system-out: untracked-new.txt surfaced as an untracked change ("?? untracked-new.txt")

testcase.name: view.toggleSidebar
testcase.system-out: toggleSidebarVisibility resolved (visibility not yet in Snapshot)

testcase.name: git.mergeConflict
testcase.system-out: merge conflicted (UU + markers), then resolved to a clean tree (no markers, losing side gone)

testcase.name: git.outsideRepo
testcase.system-out: file at /tmp/outside.txt did not appear in the repo's git status (tree stayed clean)

testcase.name: git.mergeClean
testcase.system-out: clean merge: feat.txt present, tree clean, no conflict markers

testcase.name: visual.workbenchTabSmoke
testcase.system-out: workbench visible with 3 tab(s); screenshot 1280x720, blackish=0.0003, buckets=105

testcase.name: flow.cancelBeforeDebounce
testcase.system-out: Hub session "r1-base-f58" never reached "waiting" after a PreToolUse cancelled by a prompt Stop (states: idle)

testcase.name: flow.secondRunMergesSession
testcase.system-out: Hub session "r1-base-f59" merged a second run: runs 1→2 in ONE row

testcase.name: search.editorFind
testcase.system-out: actions.find resolved; activeEditor stayed on find-here.txt

testcase.name: search.addNextOccurrence
testcase.system-out: addSelectionToNextFindMatch resolved (multi-cursor count not in snapshot)

testcase.name: search.gotoSymbolEditor
testcase.system-out: gotoSymbol resolved; activeEditor stayed on syms.txt

testcase.name: search.editorFindReplace
testcase.system-out: startFindReplaceAction resolved; activeEditor stayed on replace-here.txt

testcase.name: diag.quickFixNoActions
testcase.system-out: quickFix resolved with no actions; env still responsive

testcase.name: diag.jsonError
testcase.system-out: bad.json has 1 built-in JSON diagnostic(s) (sev present)

testcase.name: diag.jsonClears
testcase.system-out: JSON diagnostic cleared after fixing the trailing comma

testcase.name: diag.problemsEmpty
testcase.system-out: Problems view opened on an empty workspace; diagnostics stayed 0

testcase.name: terminal.splitFromEmpty
testcase.system-out: fresh 0 → split resolved ok=true; count=0 (graceful no-op, no throw/hang)

testcase.name: view.toggleTerminalHidesOne
testcase.system-out: terminalCount 1 → 1 (want 1→1; toggle only hides, does not dispose)

testcase.name: view.gotoLineWithEditor
testcase.system-out: gotoLine resolved with an editor open; activeEditor unchanged

testcase.name: view.gotoLineNoEditor
testcase.system-out: gotoLine with no active editor resolved (no-op, did not throw)

testcase.name: view.toggleZen
testcase.system-out: toggleZenMode resolved; visibleEditors stable, activeEditor stable

testcase.name: view.closeEditorNoEditor
testcase.system-out: closeEditor on empty editor area resolved ok; openTabs 0 → 0 (unchanged)

testcase.name: view.resetLayout
testcase.system-out: resetViewLocations resolved from a mutated layout; visibleEditors unchanged

testcase.name: view.zenRoundtrip
testcase.system-out: toggleZenMode x2 resolved; visibleEditors stable, openTabs stable

testcase.name: settings.writeSettingsJson
testcase.system-out: editor.fontSize read back as 17 after writing .vscode/settings.json

testcase.name: settings.malformedSettingsJson
testcase.system-out: config read survived a malformed settings.json (editor.fontSize=12)

testcase.name: settings.wordWrapNotConfigBacked
testcase.system-out: editor.wordWrap config correctly UNCHANGED ("off") — toggle is a per-editor override

testcase.name: settings.toggleWordWrapNoEditor
testcase.system-out: toggleWordWrap with no active editor resolved (no-op, did not throw)

testcase.name: settings.readBeforeEditor
testcase.system-out: setting read with zero editors open returned boolean true

testcase.name: settings.workspaceOverride
testcase.system-out: editor.tabSize effective value is the workspace override 2 (not the default 4)

testcase.name: settings.toggleAndWriteAgree
testcase.system-out: editor.minimap.enabled file=false → toggle → true (flipped to !false as expected)

testcase.name: search.findInFiles
testcase.system-out: executeCommand(findInFiles) returned ok (no view in snapshot to assert)

testcase.name: view.toggleSidebar
testcase.system-out: toggleSidebarVisibility resolved (visibility not yet in Snapshot)

testcase.name: visual.workbenchTabSmoke
testcase.system-out: workbench visible with 1 tab(s); screenshot 1280x720, blackish=0.0003, buckets=101

testcase.system-out: executeCommand(findInFiles) returned ok (no view in snapshot to assert)
